examples: The Angry Birds craze continues to captivate smartphone users across the globe.
The son is so captivate with the woman that he does not heed his parents' warning.
I would captivate them with money before telling them that we needed to deforest their land.
We can quite literally segment our friends and elevate the prominent stories that captivate our interest.
Scandals captivate our attention as sensational headlines punctuate the mundane din of modern life.
